fhir_implementation_guides.name: Potential Drug/Drug Interaction (PDDI) CDS
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Clinical decision support (CDS) artifacts surfacing high-risk drug-drug interactions at the point of ordering, delivered as CDS Hooks and PlanDefinition/ActivityDefinition resources.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: CDS Hooks + Library/PlanDefinition artifacts for order-entry decision support

fhir_implementation_guides.name: IHE Mobile access to Health Documents (MHD)
fhir_implementation_guides.description: IHE ITI supplement exposing XDS-style document sharing over FHIR using DocumentReference, DocumentManifest, and List resources with FHIR-based push/pull and XDS-on-FHIR affinities.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: DocumentReference/List-based document sharing + XDS affinity domain mapping

fhir_implementation_guides.name: gematik ePA Medication Service
fhir_implementation_guides.description: German national e-prescription and medication service profiles for the elektronische Patientenakte (ePA), covering prescription, dispense, and medication plan exchange.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: National ePA medication profiles + e-prescription workflow

fhir_implementation_guides.name: IHE Verifiable Health Links (VHL)
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Patient-mediated sharing of health information using internet-accessible, cryptographically verifiable health links (VHL), enabling patient-controlled access without a centralized hub.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: Verifiable credential-style links + patient-mediated data retrieval

fhir_implementation_guides.name: Consolidated CDA (C-CDA) Release 5.0
fhir_implementation_guides.description: US Realm CDA implementation guide defining consolidated clinical document templates enabling exchange of USCDI v6 content; the CDA companion to US Core.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: CDA document templates + USCDI-aligned section templates

fhir_implementation_guides.name: IHE De-Identification Handbook (DeId)
fhir_implementation_guides.description: IHE handbook and profiles defining requirements and techniques for de-identifying health information while preserving utility for secondary use and research.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: De-identification rule profiles + dataset transformation specification

fhir_implementation_guides.name: C-CDA on FHIR
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Defines FHIR Composition profiles representing C-CDA document types and sections, enabling interoperation between CDA and FHIR using US Core for coded entries.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: Composition document profiles + C-CDA template-to-FHIR mapping

fhir_implementation_guides.name: FHIR Query & Response for Public Health
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Helios Accelerator white paper/IG describing the application of FHIR query and response patterns to public health use cases and reporting workflows.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: FHIR query/response patterns applied to public health reporting

fhir_implementation_guides.name: Order Catalog Implementation Guide
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Defines catalogs of orderable items (medication products, lab tests, procedures, devices, order sets) using Catalog profile on Composition, supporting ordering and other healthcare processes.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: Catalog (Composition) of orderable items + referencing of catalog entries

fhir_implementation_guides.name: FHIR Application Feature Framework
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Framework for describing application features (capabilities) as FHIR resources, allowing clients and servers to negotiate optional functionality beyond core CapabilityStatements.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: Feature declaration resources + CapabilityStatement extensions

fhir_implementation_guides.name: HL7 Europe Patient Summary (eu EPS)
fhir_implementation_guides.description: European-realm adaptation of the International Patient Summary, representing national patient summary constraints for cross-border care within Europe (myHealth@eu).
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: Regional IPS adaptation + national cross-border extension

fhir_implementation_guides.name: HL7 Belgium Vaccination
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Belgian national FHIR profiles for immunization recording and exchange, supporting the national vaccination registry and cross-border patient summary needs.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: National immunization profiles + vaccination registry exchange

fhir_implementation_guides.name: PACIO Transitions of Care
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Standards-based solution for patient care transitions and coordination across Long-Term Post-Acute Care (LTPAC) settings, using DocumentReference/Composition and QuestionnaireResponse.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: LTPAC transitions-of-care document + structured assessment exchange

fhir_implementation_guides.name: HL7 Europe Medication Prescription and Dispense (MPD)
fhir_implementation_guides.description: European-realm FHIR profiles for medication prescription and dispense, harmonizing cross-border e-prescription and dispense workflows across EU member states.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: Regional e-prescription/dispense profiles + cross-border mapping

fhir_implementation_guides.name: AU Patient Summary
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Australian Patient Summary conforming to IPS and AU Core, setting minimum FHIR expectations for patient summary exchange in an Australian context.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: National IPS-derived patient summary profiles

fhir_implementation_guides.name: De-identification, Anonymization and Redaction Toolkit Services (DARTS)
fhir_implementation_guides.description: FHIR services IG for de-identifying, anonymizing, and redacting FHIR data, defining operations and profiles for privacy-preserving data handling.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: De-identification/anonymization $operations + redaction profiles

fhir_implementation_guides.name: De-identified, Anonymized FHIR Profiles Library (DAPL)
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Library of FHIR profiles representing de-identified and anonymized data, complementing DARTS by providing ready-to-use constrained profiles for secondary-use datasets.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: De-identified/anonymized profile library for secondary use

fhir_implementation_guides.name: Radiation Dose Summary for Diagnostic Procedures on FHIR
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Defines how to represent radiation dose summaries for diagnostic imaging procedures (CT, radiography, etc.) using Observation and related resources.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: Imaging dose Observation profiles + modality-specific components

fhir_implementation_guides.name: CDC NHSN Situational Awareness Framework for Reporting (SAFR)
fhir_implementation_guides.description: CDC NHSN IG for situational awareness reporting, supporting public-health emergency reporting of healthcare capacity, supplies, and patient data during emergency responses.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: Public-health situational awareness reporting + Measure/MeasureReport

fhir_implementation_guides.name: Taiwan NHI Prior Authorization Support (TWPAS)
fhir_implementation_guides.description: Taiwan National Health Insurance prior authorization support IG, defining FHIR profiles for pre-authorization requests and responses (e.g. for cancer drug reimbursement) using Claim and supporting resources.
fhir_implementation_guides.design_pattern: National prior-authorization FHIR profiles + Claim/$submit-style exchange
